creator: philip@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have whitelisted 24.113.41.81/bsdforge.com/mx99.ultimatedns.net on mx1.freebsd.org in case you get listed by Spamhaus again.

For future reference: assigning a bug to postmaster or sending us email from somewhere that isn't blocked will get things mitigated pretty quickly.  We have no problem whitelisting contributors if they get filtered by third-party blacklists we consult.
